compiled_state.title: Implement auth-file allowlist in session-misc-functions.sh hook_worktree_isolation_guard
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Update hook_worktree_isolation_guard() in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh to mirror the standalone guard allowlist logic from worktree-isolation-guard.sh.

### Implementation:
1. After detecting isolation=worktree in the function, check for auth marker files
2. Same logic as standalone: glob, read PID, verify liveness via kill -0
3. Valid marker → return 0 (allow)
4. No valid marker → return 2 with permissionDecision:deny (existing behavior)
5. Clean stale markers (dead PIDs)
6. Keep function in sync with standalone script

### Files to modify
- plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh (EDIT — safeguard file, authorized by story scope)

### TDD Requirement
RED tests from Task 3 must turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh
- [ ] Function logic matches standalone guard logic
  Verify: echo "Verified by matching behavior in test suites"
- [ ] All existing session-misc tests still pass
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-session-misc-dispatchers.sh

comments.body: Fixed: Auth-file allowlist implemented in session-misc function. 88 tests pass, 0 fail.
comments.author: Test
